title: psilotrichum tomentosum
intro: Psilotrichum tomentosum, also known as the hairy psilotrichum, is a plant species in the Psilotrichaceae family, native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling. The health benefits of Psilotrichum tomentosum include its ability to treat wounds, burns, and skin infections, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Psilotrichum tomentosum can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties to the affected area.
